summary: Dashboard Improvements P2 Testing Complete - All backend endpoints pass (11/11). UI components work correctly: Activity widget expand/collapse/load more, Finance Widget period selector (1/3/6/12 months), Finance Details page with 5 tabs and CSV export.

issues: Shows 'Няма данни' (No data) even though there are invoices with counterparty_id - this may be because supplier_counterparty_id is null for most test invoices

backend: GET /api/dashboard/activity - pagination with page/limit params works
GET /api/reports/finance-details/summary - all presets work (this_month, last_month, last_3_months, etc)
frontend: Dashboard loads with all widgets (stats, projects, finance, activity)
Activity widget shows 3 items by default
Expand Activity button shows 'Покажи всички (14444)' and works
Activity expanded shows all items with 'Скрий' button
Load more button in expanded activity works
Finance Summary Widget with period/weekly toggle present
Period selector dropdown opens and shows 1/3/6/12 month options
Selecting 6 months updates chart to show 6 columns (Sep-Feb)
Finance Details page loads with 5 tabs
Обобщение tab shows KPIs and Top 10 counterparties
Разбивка tab shows pie chart and breakdown table
По контрагент tab shows table with headers
По проект tab shows table with headers
Транзакции tab shows transaction list with filters
Export CSV button is visible and clickable
Period filter works (Този месец, Последни 3 месеца, etc)

action_items: MINOR: Finance Details 'По контрагент' tab shows 'Няма данни' - verify seed data has supplier_counterparty_id set on invoices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard P2 improvements are fully functional. Activity widget has expand/collapse with Load more pagination. Finance Summary Widget supports 1/3/6/12 month period selection and weekly view toggle. Finance Details page at /reports/finance-details has 5 tabs (Overview, Breakdown, By Counterparty, By Project, Transactions) with server-side pagination and CSV export. All backend endpoints in dashboard.py are working correctly with proper data structure.
